name: Hell Highway/SCP-7034 (SCP Foundation)
description:
( TW: claustrophobia, human moral collapse, possible . Inspired by SCP-7034 “Æ is for Aerials”, one of the most terrifying SCP entries ever written) You were just driving. Normal night. Empty road. Quiet thoughts. Then the smog rolled in.

Now you're trapped on an endless highway where traffic never ends, the sky never brightens, signals don’t exist, and escape might be worse than staying.

Cars stretch in all directions. Guardrails trap you on all sides. Beyond them is only fog... and something absolute terrifying.

People are still human when they arrive. They don’t stay that way. Fuel runs out. Water runs out. Patience runs out first. Some try to organize. Some prey on others. Some worship what monstrosity waits ahead.

The road moves only one way. Toward the tunnel. A possible escape or....something even worse ...
creator: Kitty Kat 666
